arts.ttl: Tottenham lineup vs. Aston Villa: Predicted XI for FA Cup clash as Mathys Tel, Mikey Moore calls made
arts.sum: Sports Mole takes an in-depth look at how Tottenham Hotspur could line up for Sunday's FA Cup fourth-round clash with Aston Villa.

arts.ttl: Rodgers delight as Celtic fans allowed to travel for Bayern Munich
arts.sum: Brendan Rodgers is delighted Celtic fans can travel to Bayern Munich to "drive the team on" in the Champions League after admitting the threat of an away supporters ban had been a "big worry".

arts.ttl: Marco Friedl wouldn’t say no to Bayern Munich again
arts.sum: Former Bayern Munich youth player Marco Friedl would not mind the opportunity to return to his childhood club one day. The SV Werder Bremen defender spent his youth days at the Bayern campus.

arts.ttl: VfL Wolfsburg’s Patrick Wimmer offers himself to Bayern Munich
arts.sum: As reported by Sky Germany, VfL Wolfsburg’s Patrick Wimmer has offered himself to Bayern Munich. The Wolves forward signed for the club back in 2022 from Arminia Bielefeld for €5m.…

arts.ttl: Celtic’s wobbly window proves a source of intrigue before Bayern battle | Ewan Murray
arts.sum: Failure to replace Kyogo Furuhashi with domestic dominance assured shows a sense of throwing up a white flag in Europe If Celtic’s aspirations centred on Scottish football, the demolition of Dundee within 48 hours of the transfer window closing would have proved a useful antidote. By the conclusion of that 6-0 victory, Celtic were 13 points and 29 goals ahead of their closest challengers in the Scottish Premiership. Brendan Rodgers could field Rab C Nesbitt up front for the remainder of the season and Celtic would romp to a successful title defence. It was matters of a striking order, combined with a bigger picture, that triggered the Celtic support as the window shut. It also tickled those anxious to see Scotland’s dominant force knocked off their pedestal (good luck there). Rodgers exaggerated in describing Kyogo Furuhashi as a “legendary” Celtic forward but the fact remains he was an excellent one, a certain starter when fit and a player who made clear months ago he wanted to depart. Continue reading...

arts.ttl: Celtic's Champions League squad revealed as Jota and Schlupp IN as left-field striker option emerges for Bayern Munich clash
arts.sum: Brendan Rodgers has added his two new Bhoys with Kyogo and Alex Valle out after exits from Parkhead

arts.ttl: Weekend Warm-up: Bayern Munich’s Alphonso Davies is done, Jamal Musiala is next, but whither Joshua Kimmich? Max Eberl tackles the elephant in the room; Throwing it back to Stone Temple Pilots; Bundesliga predictions; and MORE!
arts.sum: Regardless, the Bayern Munich negotiating team is working hard to convince Kimmich to stay, but also does not want him to feel rushed. Alphonso Davies extended his contract this week and Jamal Musiala is expected to formalize his agreement this month, but what about Joshua Kimmich — the guy who might be the team’s most valuable player this season?

arts.ttl: Former Bayern Munich technical director rates Bayern’s winter window
arts.sum: There was only one permanent signing in the window in signing Jonas Urbig from FC Köln, though the Bavarians were able to confirm the signing of Tom Bischof from TSG Hoffenheim as well. The two loans of Mathys Tel and Adam Aznou ensure the boys have significantly more match practice than what would have been possible at Bayern.

arts.ttl: Bayern Munich legend Uli Hoeneß grumbles over Thomas Tuchel’s repeated calls for expensive transfers
arts.sum: We wanted to try to work with more of our own players in the medium term,” Hoeneß explained, via @iMiaSanMia . Even before Tuchel left the club, legendary former Bayern president Uli Hoeneß saw fit to speak in public about his dissatisfaction with certain elements of Tuchel’s work and had continued to speak about it well after the former Mainz 05 manager’s departure from the club.

arts.ttl: Mathys Tel wants to join Manchester United in the summer transfer window
arts.sum: According to BILD journalist Christian Falk, Bayern Munich forward Mathys Tel (19) would like to join Manchester United in the summer transfer window. The Frenchman is currently on loan at Tottenham…
